summary: Iter65 Phase-2 — Smart Allowance ring + Cashback celebration toast. Backend pytest 4/4 PASS (test_iter65_smart_allowance.py). Public-URL smoke confirmed both NEW keys (subscription_pct + cashback_lifetime) on /api/credits/balance — admin returns subscription_pct=100/unlimited=true, freeuser returns subscription_pct=0/unlimited=false/topup=4644. Frontend e2e verified end-to-end: ring + tooltip render for freeuser with exact spec text; admin (unlimited) shows neither ring nor tooltip — by design the Infinity icon replaces both. Cashback celebration toast was triggered live by bumping users.cashback_earned_total via Mongo and dispatching a window 'focus' event; the sonner toast appeared with text '+7 cashback credits earned!' + description 'Spending cashback dropped into your wallet.' and the Gift icon. The no-phantom-toast rule also verified — 0 toasts in the first 5s after sign-in (baseline-only first poll). A second consecutive bump (+3) also produced a second toast, confirming lastCashbackRef updates correctly between polls.

issues: Spec said 'full ring for unlimited admin (pct=100)' — implementation instead omits the SVG ring entirely and renders the Infinity icon. Visually clean and consistent ('irrelevant for admin' per request note), but if a literal full ring is desired for the admin path, the !unlimited gate on line 104 of CreditCounter.jsx would need to be removed.

critical_code_review_comments: CreditCounter.jsx renders the SVG ring only for non-unlimited users (line 104). This is a small deviation from the spec wording ('full ring for unlimited admin') but is a reasonable design choice — Infinity icon already communicates unlimited. Note it in changelog if shipping; otherwise no action needed.
credits.jsx lastCashbackRef correctly resets to null on token change (line 71) and on first successful poll merely captures the baseline. Delta-only toast logic is solid and matches spec.
Toast uses duration=5000ms + emerald Gift icon — consistent with the rest of the celebration toasts in the app.
Sonner toast container is mounted globally (verified by data-sonner-toast attr present on emission). No extra wiring needed in pages that didn't have toaster previously.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (ring renders, tooltip on hover with exact spec text, mouseout closes, admin shows neither, cashback toast fires on delta only, no phantom toast on initial poll)

test_credentials: admin@nova.ai / admin123 (unlimited, owner) and freeuser@test.com / test123 (free, 0/50 sub, 4644 topup, cashback_lifetime=10 → restored after testing).
seed_data_creation: Temporarily incremented users.cashback_earned_total for freeuser@test.com by 7 then by 3 (total +10) via /tmp/bump_cashback.py to trigger the celebration toast end-to-end. After verification, restored cashback_earned_total back to 10 with a direct $set so DB state is identical to pre-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To exercise the cashback toast: (1) sign in as freeuser, navigate to /armory, wait ~4s for baseline poll, (2) python /tmp/bump_cashback.py 7 to $inc cashback_earned_total +7, (3) page.evaluate("window.dispatchEvent(new Event('focus'))") to force an immediate poll instead of waiting 30s, (4) wait ~3s, (5) toast selector is [data-sonner-toast] OR text=/cashback credits earned/i. The no-phantom-toast rule is verified by checking 0 toasts during the first 5s of session (baseline-only first poll). Remember to restore cashback_earned_total afterward.

public_url_balance_keys.admin: {subscription_pct:100, cashback_lifetime:0, unlimited:true, subscription:1000000000, topup:1000000000, total:1000000000, subscription_max:1000000000, monthly_grant:1000000000, reset_date:null, tier:'admin'}
public_url_balance_keys.freeuser: {subscription_pct:0, cashback_lifetime:10, unlimited:false, subscription:0, topup:4644, total:4644, subscription_max:50, monthly_grant:50, reset_date:'2026-07-03T13:54:24Z', tier:'recruit'}

frontend_smart_allowance_ring.tooltip_text: SMART ALLOWANCE / Subscription 0 / 50 / Top-up 4,644 / Subscription resets Jul 3 · Top-up never expires

frontend_cashback_toast.toast_description: Spending cashback dropped into your wallet.
